title: decadent vietnamese sherry dumplings pastry
description: this dish combines the lightness of a vietnamese spring roll with the richness of a sherry-infused pastry, creating a truly decadent and bitter flavor experience.

ingredients.name: round wonton wrappers
ingredients.notes: found in most asian grocery stores

instructions: combine warm sherry, ginger, garlic, and fish sauce in a bowl and mix well
heat a pan over medium heat and add a tablespoon of oil
add one wonton wrapper to the pan and cook for 30 seconds on each side
fill each wrapper with a tablespoon of ground pork and a sprinkle of hoisin sauce
fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal
cook the dumplings in the pan for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown
serve with a dipping sauce made from equal parts hoisin sauce and warm sherry
sprinkle with sesame seeds and chopped green onions
